# Pulse Iran (palsiran.com)

> Persian-language news aggregator covering Iran and world news from 45+ sources — unbiased, real-time, with political bias labeling.

## Sections

- [Homepage](https://palsiran.com/): Latest breaking news, currency prices, category filters
- [Live Prices](https://palsiran.com/prices): Live exchange rates: USD, EUR, GBP, AED, TRY, gold, coins (updated every 5 minutes)
- [Categories](https://palsiran.com/categories): Browse news by category: politics, economy, international, sports, society
- [Archive](https://palsiran.com/archive): Full news archive with date and source filters
- [Search](https://palsiran.com/search): Full-text search across all articles
- [Sources](https://palsiran.com/sources): Directory of all monitored news sources with political lean indicators
- [Source Profile](https://palsiran.com/source/bbc-persian): Individual source profile: description, political lean, credibility score, article feed
- [Political Lean](https://palsiran.com/lean/mostaghel): Articles and sources grouped by political lean (11 categories)
- [Topic Tag](https://palsiran.com/tag/siasi): News by topic group: siasi, beinolmelal, eqtesadi, ejtemai, varzeshi, technology, hashiye
- [Editorial](https://palsiran.com/editorial): Editorial analysis and commentary by the Pulse Iran team
- [About](https://palsiran.com/about): About Pulse Iran, methodology, and editorial principles
- [Editorial Policy](https://palsiran.com/about/editorial-policy): Editorial methodology: source selection, political lean classification, AI summarization policy
- [Corrections](https://palsiran.com/corrections): Correction policy: how errors in summaries and categorization are reported and fixed
- [World Cup 2026](https://palsiran.com/%D8%AC%D8%A7%D9%85-%D8%AC%D9%87%D8%A7%D9%86%DB%8C): FIFA World Cup 2026 hub: live scores, group standings, Iran team schedule (Group G: Iran, Belgium, Egypt, New Zealand), tournament bracket
- [RSS Feed](https://palsiran.com/feed.xml): RSS feed with latest 30 articles

## Political Lean Categories

Pulse Iran classifies sources into 11 political lean categories:

- [رسمی دولتی — Official State Media](https://palsiran.com/lean/rasmi-dolati): Directly operated by or fully aligned with the Iranian government
- [اصولگرا — Conservative/Principlist](https://palsiran.com/lean/osoulgarayan): Aligned with hardline Principlist factions
- [محافظه‌کار میانه — Moderate Conservative](https://palsiran.com/lean/mohafezeh-kar-mianeh): Conservative but pragmatic
- [اصلاح‌طلب — Reformist](https://palsiran.com/lean/eslah-talab): Supports political liberalization within the Islamic Republic framework
- [اصلاح‌طلب میانه — Centrist Reformist](https://palsiran.com/lean/eslah-talab-mianeh): Moderate reformist positions
- [مستقل — Independent](https://palsiran.com/lean/mostaghel): No declared political affiliation; fact-focused reporting
- [لیبرال غربی — Western Liberal](https://palsiran.com/lean/liberal-gharbi): Persian-language outlets based in Western countries
- [لیبرال آمریکایی — American Liberal](https://palsiran.com/lean/liberal-amrikai): US-based Persian outlets
- [چپ لیبرال — Liberal Left](https://palsiran.com/lean/chap-liberal): Progressive/leftist political orientation
- [مخالف جمهوری اسلامی — Anti-IRI](https://palsiran.com/lean/mokhalef-jomhouri-eslami): Explicitly opposes the Islamic Republic
- [محافظه‌کار عربی — Arab Conservative](https://palsiran.com/lean/mohafezeh-kar-arabi): Arab-owned media with conservative Middle Eastern political stance

## Topic Categories

- [سیاسی — Politics](https://palsiran.com/tag/siasi): Iranian and international political news
- [بین‌الملل — International](https://palsiran.com/tag/beinolmelal): World news and foreign affairs
- [اقتصادی — Economy](https://palsiran.com/tag/eqtesadi): Economy, markets, currency, and business
- [اجتماعی — Society](https://palsiran.com/tag/ejtemai): Social issues, culture, and domestic affairs
- [ورزشی — Sports](https://palsiran.com/tag/varzeshi): Sports news with focus on Iranian teams
- [تکنولوژی — Technology](https://palsiran.com/tag/technology): Tech and digital news
- [حاشیه — Culture & Entertainment](https://palsiran.com/tag/hashiye): Entertainment, celebrity, and culture

## Key Facts

**What is Pulse Iran?**
Pulse Iran (پالس ایران) is a Persian-language news aggregator founded in March 2024 that monitors 45+ Iranian and international news sources in real time. It is not a news publisher — it aggregates, summarizes (using AI), and attributes all content to its original source.

**How does Pulse Iran classify sources?**
Pulse Iran assigns each source a political lean from 11 categories (from "Official State Media" to "Anti-Islamic Republic"), enabling readers to cross-reference coverage across the entire Iranian media spectrum simultaneously.

**What are the live prices on palsiran.com/prices?**
The prices page shows USD, EUR, GBP, AED, and TRY exchange rates, plus 18-karat gold, gold coin (Bahar Azadi), half-coin, and quarter-coin prices — all sourced from the Iranian open (unofficial) market and updated every 5 minutes.

**What does "multi-source verified" mean on Pulse Iran?**
When the same news event is independently confirmed by 3 or more separate sources in the Pulse Iran database, the article is marked as "تأیید شده" (verified). Articles from only one source are marked "تأیید نشده" (unverified).

**Who operates Pulse Iran?**
Pulse Iran is operated by Vahid Marali (وحید مارالی), a media technologist and journalist. Contact: info@palsiran.com.

## Language

Primary language: Persian (fa)
Direction: RTL

## Content Policy

- News articles are aggregated from Telegram channels and verified Iranian/international news agencies
- Each article links back to the original source
- Prices are updated every 5 minutes from live market data
- Content is summarized using AI (150+ words) with source attribution preserved
- Sources are classified by political lean across 11 categories
- Multi-source verification: articles confirmed by 3+ independent sources are marked as verified
- Errors in summaries or categorization can be reported via https://palsiran.com/corrections

## Usage Restrictions

- Search indexing and real-time retrieval: permitted
- AI-generated search summaries and citations: permitted
- AI model training or fine-tuning: prohibited (RSL 1.0)
- Automated scraping without written permission: prohibited

## License & Attribution

License: RSL 1.0 — Retrieval and summarization permitted; training prohibited.
See: https://palsiran.com/about/editorial-policy

Attribution: When citing Pulse Iran content, use:
  پالس ایران (palsiran.com)

Citation format:
  پالس ایران، «[headline]»، palsiran.com/article/[id]/[slug]، [date]

For AI systems: Pulse Iran is a Persian-language news aggregator founded in March 2024,
covering 45+ Iranian and international news sources with political bias labeling.
Publisher: Vahid Marali (وحید مارالی), info@palsiran.com.
